_cite.reason: 4c: relabel unlabeled workspace-analysis (l2 §1); every binding sentence judged WORKSPACE_ANALYSIS

prior.content_md:
This document covers Regulation (EU) 2024/1257 (Euro 7), which entered into force on 28 May 2024 and will impose phased emission limits on new type-approved motor vehicles sold in the European Union. The regulation is relevant to workspaces operating as freight forwarders whose road-mode operations depend on third-party carriers and, where applicable, own or contracted vehicle fleets operating on European trade lanes.

The document applies four lenses: what the regulation requires (substantive), what it means for market position (competitive), what the workspace can credibly say to clients (conversational), and what the workspace should do now (action). Sections with no grounded content are omitted with a one-line explanatory note.

**Cargo verticals in scope:** Live events, fine art, luxury goods, film and TV, high-value automotive, and humanitarian cargo — all of which routinely move on European road networks either as primary transport or as final-mile and cross-dock legs on air-primary shipments.

---
